intro: Angelica sinensis, also known as dong quai, is a traditional Chinese herbal medicine often formulated into tablets for various health benefits. The Angelica sinensis tablet is believed to promote women's health, particularly in regulating menstrual cycles and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Additionally, it is thought to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its potential benefits in cardiovascular health and immune system support.
